title: Poster Ideas for Evangelion 30 and FINAL
display_title: Poster Ideas for Evangelion 30 and FINAL
wikitext:
[]: Poster Ideas for Evangelion 3.0 and FINAL             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Thu Jun 21, 2012 2:42 pm Since that the actual poster for evangelion 3.0 and final hasn't come out yet, post in your ideas on how the posters should have. Be creative about this.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 21, 2012 2:52 pm Something kind of like that one shot from American Beauty where Mena Suvari is in the bathtub full of rose petals , only instead of rose petals, it's money , and instead of Mena Suvari, it's Hideaki Anno .

[]:             Quote Post by gorgeousshutin » Thu Jun 21, 2012 3:32 pm LMAO ~

[]:             Quote Post by ScottAsher » Thu Jun 21, 2012 6:19 pm I personally want Final to be similar if not the exact same thing as the end of Evas was, only redrawn. And for it to be renamed "The End of the Rebuild of Evangelion." Has a nice ring to it in my opinion. EDIT: Or wait, maybe it'll be Rebuild of Evangelion 4.0: This is (not) the end

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu Jun 21, 2012 7:07 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Mena Suvari is in the bathtub full of rose petals , only instead of rose petals, it's money , and instead of Mena Suvari, it's Hideaki Anno .

[]:             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Thu Jun 21, 2012 9:20 pm Well i think for 3.0 there should be a poster that has Asuka inside EVA-02 in her plugsuit bandaged, her head is down but her face is not showing. What do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Jun 21, 2012 11:40 pm The stair posters are pretty interesting and they seem to progress a long with the series. If FINAL turns out to be anything like End of Eva, I think it would pretty neat to see the stair poster empty of any characters and be dark red ( and orange puddles leaking ).

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Fri Jun 22, 2012 2:16 pm I don't think it can be anything other than the stair posters. This is a theme that was started in the first two movies, so it should be continued. Here are my guesses for 3.0: - Asuka now wears an eyepatch or bandage over her left eye. - Shinji, Rei or both will be absent. - The staircase will be in ruins. - Possibly new characters are added (but probably not). Here are my guesses for 4.0 (much in line with TheFriskyIan): - The staircase will be in ruins and be empty. - Except perhaps for Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jun 22, 2012 2:33 pm Ornette wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 22, 2012 8:56 pm Can't remember if that was Ornette's or Naveryw's but either way it's so true

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jun 22, 2012 10:11 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Can't remember if that was Ornette's or Naveryw's but either way it's so true

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Fri Jun 22, 2012 11:03 pm Mr. Tines wrote: picture

[]:             Quote Post by Napul » Sat Jun 23, 2012 9:58 am Jornophelanthas wrote: Here are my guesses for 3.0: - Asuka now wears an eyepatch or bandage over her left eye. - Shinji, Rei or both will be absent. - The staircase will be in ruins. - Possibly new characters are added (but probably not).

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Jun 23, 2012 10:14 am I want 3.0 or Final's promotional stuff to completely subvert EoE's stuff. Something like a light-hearted poster with most of the cast diving into a pool with vibrant blue water, with the camera looking from the ground up and Rei stood on a diving board looking at them all. Like the water restoration place in 2.0. I think it'd be a neat subversion of EoE's "Wouldn't it be nice if everyone just died?" poster. Actually for that purpose the current 3.0 blue gradient one works quite well.

[]:             Quote Post by Amitch1991 » Sat Jun 23, 2012 11:30 pm Napul wrote: Like this? Like this? This is out of the question. For 4.0 poster I will accept only something like this: My dream poster.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Sat Jun 23, 2012 11:40 pm Amitch1991 wrote: The 2nd and 3rd one are awesome , but it will most probably be something like the 1st one

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Sun Jun 24, 2012 1:38 am Na7e wrote: The second is good. The third just stinks of a crappy romance. As for the first one, I'd get rid of Hikari, Kensuke, and Toji, I'm going to take a guess that they're dead.

[]: IT NEVER ENDS! BO             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Jun 24, 2012 2:10 am A hand slapping Shinji's face – forever. So the hand is somehow moved by a perpetual motion generator .

[]:             Quote Post by Amitch1991 » Sun Jun 24, 2012 3:21 am Na7e wrote: The second is good. The third just stinks of a crappy romance. As for the first one, I'd get rid of Hikari, Kensuke, and Toji, I'm going to take a guess that they're dead.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sun Jun 24, 2012 3:41 am Napul wrote: For 4.0 poster I will accept only something like this:
